prompt: 我要做一个完整的用户系统，包括注册登录、权限管理、用户画像分析和社交关系
assertions: The response recognizes the request spans multiple independent subsystems
The response proposes a decomposition listing at least 3 sub-projects (e.g., auth, permissions, profile/analytics, social)
The response asks the user to confirm which sub-project to start with rather than diving into all of them
The response does NOT brainstorm or design all subsystems simultaneously
